response: guest i am stefan muller, seeking to join in2code in rosenheim as an apprentice for the position of fachinformatiker für anwendungsentwicklung. guest i have a wirtschaftsschulabschluss and have completed the verschule for the abitur, but no formal education. guest i am passionate about it and have enjoyed working on small python projects since childhood. guest i am currently looking for an opportunity to start my career in the field of internet and intranet solutions based on typo3. guest i am interested in learning and growing in a dynamic environment. guest i am available for an interview at your convenience.
